page_title: EVANGELION MUSIC SELECTION Type Nippon TV
text:
EVANGELION MUSIC SELECTION Type Nippon TV is a compilation album included with the Evangelion themed CD recorder released by I-O Data (CDRI-W24AI2/EVA), released in June, 2020. It was a collection with Shirō Sagisu and Yoko Takahashi. https://vgmdb.net/album/98160
